title: Korak 21

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: You should create an elif statement that checks that previous_node is not None.
tests.testString:
({ test: () => runPython(`
_cond = _Node(_code).find_class("LinkedList").find_function("remove").find_ifs()[0].find_conditions()[1]
assert _cond.is_equivalent("previous_node is not None")
`) })

tests.text: You should assign current_node.next to previous_node.next inside the elif statement.
tests.testString:
({ test: () => runPython(`
_cond = _Node(_code).find_class("LinkedList").find_function("remove").find_ifs()[0]
assert _cond.is_equivalent("if current_node is None:\\n return\\nelif previous_node is not None:\\n previous_node.next = current_node.next")
`) })

description:
Zatim, kreiraj elif izjavu koja proverava da li previous_node nije None. Unutar nje dodeli current_node.next na previous_node.next.

Time, ako je pronađen element koji treba ukloniti i nije u glavnom čvoru, pokazivač next prethodnog čvora će biti ažuriran da preskoči trenutni čvor (element koji se uklanja), uklanjajući ga iz spojenog popisa.
